name: Mission 3 % : Passe à l’action
description:
Tu arrives à la dernière étape de la Mission 3 %.

Découvre les opportunités disponibles sur Bybit EU et complète les actions suivantes pour finaliser la mission.

Étapes à suivre pour les nouveaux utilisateurs :

- Visite la page de la campagne 3 % sur Bybit EU
(tu dois être connecté à ton compte pour y accéder)

- Dépose au moins 100 € sur la plateforme via Apple Pay ou Google Pay ou CB classique, ou en crypto. Tu débloqueras 40 € de bonus.  

- Dépose tes EURC sur la pool EURC à 20 % de rendement pendant 7 jours via Bybit Earn.  Seuls les nouveaux utilisateurs Bybit EU peuvent souscrire à cette pool. 

Afin de rester éligible au tirage au sort pour une part des 2 500 € en BTC, conserve tes fonds sur Bybit EU jusqu’au 31 mars.

Une fois ces étapes complétées, tu auras terminé toutes les quests de la mission et pourras participer au tirage au sort.

Note importante : Un UID te sera demandé pour ces quêtes. Voici comment le retrouver sur ton compte : 

Si tu es sur ton ordinateur, il se trouve en haut à droite de l'écran : 

![UID Desktop.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85554/942b39a0-f487-42fe-8ad7-7d517ec54333.png)

Si tu es sur l'app Bybit EU, l'UID se trouve à côté de ton avatar : 

![UID APP.jpg](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85554/69b9bb9f-2286-4ff9-b16f-04173e5eb75b.jpeg)

name: Mission Inscription & Vérification
description:
Rejoins l’écosystème Bybit EU et franchis une nouvelle étape de la mission.

Pour valider cette quête :

- Crée ton compte sur Bybit EU

- Complète la vérification d’identité sur la plateforme

Une fois ta vérification d’identité validée, tu débloqueras également un bonus de 5 € en BTC sur ton compte.

La création de ton compte te permettra aussi d’accéder aux campagnes en cours sur Bybit EU, notamment :

- 3 % d’APY sur tes dépôts

- 20 % d’APR sur l’EURC via Bybit Earn

Continue les prochaines quêtes pour te rapprocher du tirage au sort et tenter de remporter une part des 2 500 € en BTC.

Note importante : Un UID te sera demandé pour ces quêtes. Voici comment le retrouver sur ton compte : 

Si tu es sur ton ordinateur, il se trouve en haut à droite de l'écran : 

![UID Desktop.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/85554/942b39a0-f487-42fe-8ad7-7d517ec54333.png)

name: Special Benefits for SoneFi / XY Finance / CometBridge / RetroBridge users
description:
Welcome to your new home, users from SoneFi, XY Finance, CometBridge, and RetroBridge.

Over the past two years, SoneFi, XY Finance, CometBridge, and RetroBridge have gradually shut down. You may have left important footprints there—but it might be time to move to a new home: WheelX.

WheelX supports both bridging and swapping, and offers a faster, cheaper, and more secure experience.

We’re also offering 20%–40% fee discounts for users from these platforms.

Give it a try and verify your benefits here: https://wheelx.fi/move

name: Generate Extra Income with the Partners Program
description:
Mint your Olympex Pass and start accumulating points with every action on the platform. Your activity only counts if you hold the Pass, this is your gateway to future rewards, benefits, and progression.

Early users are the ones who get positioned first.

Want to go further? You can also apply to the Olympex Partners Program and start generating additional income by bringing new users into the ecosystem.

Don’t wait. Start early.

Mint your Olympex Pass and start building your place in the ecosystem. 🏛️

name: Mission Sociale : Rejoins la communauté
description:
Commence la mission en rejoignant la communauté Bybit EU 🇫🇷.

Dans cette première étape, connecte-toi avec l’écosystème Bybit EU et découvre le contenu partagé par Victor VL.

Pour valider cette quête :

- Suis @BybitFr sur X

- Suis Victor VL sur X

- Like, retweete et quote le tweet épinglé sur @BybitFr en taguant 3 amis

- Regarde une vidéo de Victor VL

Une fois toutes les actions complétées, tu pourras passer à la prochaine étape de la mission.

name: RivrDEX is celebrating 50,000 transactions on testnet.
description:
***It took you exactly 1 month to make 2.5x more transactions while testing our DEX than in the previous month.***

As of now, more than **50,000** transactions have been completed.

Let’s once again remember which actions you performed most often:
🔹More than **37,000** swaps were made.
🔹You added liquidity to pools more than **11,500** times.
🔹You removed liquidity from pools more than **1,900** times.

Thank you all for helping with the testing, and especially for the feedback you continue to leave.

To celebrate this event, we decided to launch a special quest on Galxe.

This quest isn’t an easy one, because we created a special quiz that only true experts will be able to complete.

What about the rewards?
🔹Galxe points that determine your place on the leaderboard.
🔹100 $USDT that will be distributed through a raffle among several lucky winners.

Duration?
🔹Starts today
🔹Deadline - March 31 at 12:00 AM

Join the quest and do your best to get the highest place possible on the leaderboard.

name: Upload your Apple Health data & Grab 20,000 $DATA Points!
description:
**Download and share your anonymized Apple Health data to earn more $DATA points.**

Description:
1. Open the Health app on your iOS device.
2. Tap your picture or initials in the top-right corner.
3. Scroll down and tap Export All Health Data.
4. Email or AirDrop the Health Data file to your computer.
5. Upload the .zip archive on this page using the  Upload Health Data button, then click Verify. 
6.  After your Health Data is verified, you will receive your $DATA points.

name: Adreva Early Access "Ad Rebel" Role
description:
# New Role Quest — Ad Rebel

We’ve launched a new Galxe quest to unlock the Ad Rebel role in the Adreva community.

https://app.galxe.com/quest/ADREVA

Ad Rebel NFT — Coming Next

### The Ad Rebel role will be required to claim the upcoming **Ad Rebel NFT**.

This NFT design will be modeled after the winners of the ongoing Community Creative Competitions, which stop accepting submissions on March 14.

https://app.galxe.com/quest/ADREVA/GCbnFtYrYM

Once the design submissions have been voted on by the community and the winners finalized - the **Ad Rebel NFT claim quest will open for** **Ad Rebel role holders ONLY.**

## Important Update on Previous Rewards

The following early launch rewards are no longer available:

- **Ad Warrior Discord role** is no longer available to claim.
- **Ad Warrior NFT** — 2,194 issued
- **Proof of Attention (POA) NFT** — 1,826 issued

These were part of Adreva launch week and will no longer be issued going forward.

**The Ad Rebel role now replaces it as the primary gateway role for future campaigns, rewards, and NFT claims.**

## On-Chain Records

**Ad Warrior NFT**
https://basescan.org/token/0xe118ddb1ced180be869975c4879e71af7f1bb746

**Proof of Attention POAP**
https://basescan.org/token/0x7f9d42dae943d38fed838ccf959e56f455c4321a

## What This Means

The "Ad Rebel" role becomes the new user gateway for upcoming campaigns, rewards, and NFT claims in the Adreva ecosystem.

## Complete the quest and join the rebellion.

name: Upload your Amazon Orders data & Grab 15,000 $DATA Points!
description:
**Download and share your anonymized Amazon order data to earn more $DATA points.**

Description
1. Make sure your DataHive AI extension is online.
2. Go to https://www.amazon.com and sign in to your Amazon account.
3. Scroll down to the Manage Your Data section and click Request your data.

![SCR-20260217-nhlk.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/84181/09d5ed32-cdbf-4c82-82b8-9bbc3ba5ea0c.png)
4. On the Request your data page, click Submit Request for Your Orders.

![SCR-20260217-nilw.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/84181/4890740a-0e78-474e-930e-69b9ab490d39.png)
5. You will receive an email with the subject Your Data Request Confirmation. Click the Confirm Data Request button in the email.

![SCR-20260217-njju.png](https://appeco.galxe.com/galxe/space/mdresource/84181/5ff65383-a01b-4913-b867-0b5e5c0fc3dd.png)
6. Within a few days, you will receive another email with your Amazon data archive. Upload it on this screen using the Upload Amazon Data button, then click Verify.
7. After we verify your Amazon data, you will receive your $DATA points.

name: Connect Amazon & Grab 500 $DATA Points!
description:
Boost your ranking and secure your spot in the upcoming airdrop! By connecting your Amazon account to the DataHive AI dashboard, you will instantly unlock a 500 $DATA points boost. Your contribution helps us crawl high-quality product data, and in return, you earn a direct stake in our ecosystem rewards.

Step-by-Step Guide:
1. Stay Active: Ensure your DataHive AI extension is installed and online.
2. Connect: Go to Amazon.com and log in to your account.
3. Sync: Once logged in, the extension will verify your session.
4. Claim: Return to this Galxe page to verify the task and collect your 500 points!

name: Start DataHive AI Missions & Claim Your Points Now!
description: By sharing anonymized data, you're not just earning points - you're contributing to more accurate, globally representative AI models. Privacy-first, always. Join Hive!
